title: ToolCallPayload
description: The typed input the agent sends to the process_refund tool. Validated by the PreToolUseHook BEFORE dispatch to the external refund API (FR-001, FR-002). A validation failure is converted into a StructuredError with reason_code='schema_violation' and MUST result in zero external API calls (FR-006, SC-002). Constitution Principle II (Schema-Enforced Boundaries, NON-NEGOTIABLE).

tool_name.description: Only the refund tool is in scope for this kata.

correlation_id.description: UUID4. Joins this invocation to its verdict, structured error, escalation event, and audit log entry (FR-009).

amount.description: Decimal-safe string representation of the refund amount in the declared currency. Negative, zero, non-numeric, and missing values all produce schema_violation per spec §Edge Cases. A string form is used at the schema boundary because JSON floats cannot represent monetary decimals exactly; the Python layer parses this into decimal.Decimal.

currency.description: Fixed to USD for this kata. Multi-currency is explicitly out of scope per data-model.md.

customer_id.description: Opaque customer identifier passed through to the refund API stub on allow verdicts.

reason.description: Optional model-supplied note. The hook MUST NOT parse this field (FR-008) — it exists for audit traceability only.
